meaning: n.闈炴床鏂囧寲鐮旂┒,闈炴床姘戞棌涓讳箟
examples: In the period of the OAU, there were Pan-Africanism, state nationalism and local nationalism.
Du Bois held oriflamme of pan-Africanism high and devoted himself to African Negroes liberation, so that he was the thesaurus of pan-Africanism in a long time.
Committed intellectual, he did throughout his life the promotion of Pan Africanism, endogenous development, social justice, and peace in Africa.
